creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks Corey.

Sorry, forgot the PR: tag in the commit message, and also forgot the TIMESTAMP in distinfo, which is now part of the commit.

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=a1be1173a389c69879a2747a584728bba3a5d722

commit a1be1173a389c69879a2747a584728bba3a5d722
Author:     Matthias Andree <mandree@FreeBSD.org>
AuthorDate: 2021-12-10 19:39:11 +0000
Commit:     Matthias Andree <mandree@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2021-12-10 22:48:02 +0000

    mail/fetchmail: update 6.4.25, add WOLFSSL support
    
    WOLFSSL is a GPLv2+ licensed SSL library with OpenSSL compatibility
    layer. This is to permit shipping fetchmail under a clean GPLv2+
    license with OpenSSL 1.1.1.
---
 mail/fetchmail/Makefile     | 28 ++++++++++++++++++----------
 mail/fetchmail/distinfo     |  6 +++---
 mail/fetchmailconf/Makefile |  1 +
 3 files changed, 22 insertions(+), 13 deletions(-)
